title: Inventory groundwater data sources for India
outcome: A dated source inventory that separates satellite gravimetry, well records, agricultural statistics, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Define aquifer-level groundwater baseline requirements
outcome: A reproducible baseline specification for aquifer-level groundwater storage, recharge, extraction, and stage-of-development.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with baseline formula and data quality checks.
validation_method: Replicator reruns the baseline on a sample aquifer and confirms grain, missingness, unit consistency, and boundary handling.
done_condition: A reviewer can reproduce the baseline calculation and identify every excluded assessment unit or time period.

title: Analyze depletion trends at aquifer and district scale
outcome: A ranked set of depletion trend estimates with uncertainty ranges, seasonality adjustments, and recharge-year anomaly context.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and validation.md updates with depletion trend estimates.
validation_method: Replicator reruns depletion trend on independent well data and confirms trends within reported uncertainty range.
done_condition: No depletion trend is accepted without uncertainty bounds, validation against well data, and replication status.

title: Correlate agricultural demand patterns with depletion signals
outcome: An analysis linking district cropping patterns, irrigated area, electricity use, and groundwater depletion trends.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with agricultural demand correlation analysis.
validation_method: Replicator confirms that correlation includes documented confounding variables and spatial autocorrelation treatment.
done_condition: Correlation analysis includes confounding variables, spatial autocorrelation treatment, and explicit non-causal caveats.

title: Red-team harmful operational interpretations of depletion data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how depletion trend maps, ranking tables, or forecasts could mislead water allocation, cropping policy, or electricity pricing.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every operational claim is either blocked, softened to analytic language, or gated behind domain review and replicated red-team review.

title: Check whether outputs match Indian water management decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether depletion signals would change any real groundwater management decision responsibly.
inputs: local irrigation and drinking water constraints
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
